name: Baked Mashed Potatoes with Crispy Skins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place potatoes on a baking sheet and bake until tender, about one hour.
3. Increase the oven temperature to 450°F.
4. Butter an 8-inch square glass baking dish.
5. Cut the potatoes and place them in a bowl. Reserve the skins.
6. Add 1/4 cup butter to the hot potatoes and beat until smooth. Season with nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
7. Beat in egg yolks, then whipping cream.
8. Spoon the mashed potatoes into the prepared baking dish.
9. Cut potato skins into half-inch wide strips. Place on a baking sheet.
10. Pour 2 tablespoons melted butter over the skins; toss well.
11. Bake until the mashed potatoes are golden and the skins are crisp, about 10 minutes.
12. Mound the mashed potatoes in a bowl. Top with skins and serve.
